name: standards-refresh.sh --registry walks entries, dispatches through S-2 fetcher.sh, and writes target namespace YAML
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r06-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; [ -f $OUT/out/european-union/r06-src.yaml ] && grep -q 'total=1 processed=1' e.err && grep -q 'shape=html-sections' e.err && echo orchestrator-walks-registry 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
